title: FraggyCarpetAternos
description: This is a modpack which contains carpet mod and its extension in one modpack
body:
This is a modpack which contains carpet mod and its extension in one modpack

Which allows you to:-

->'Test your farms over several hours in only a few minutes, as fast as your computer can'

->'You see a detailed breakdown of the items they produce'

->'See the server mobcap, TPS, etc'

->'Let pistons push block entities (ie. chests)'
